title: Bounded Bodies, JSON, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Validation · Go Semantics Case: Json Single Value Unknown
summary: A create endpoint trusts Content-Length, decodes one JSON value but ignores trailing data, accepts unknown fields, buffers uploads in memory, and reports internal parser errors to clients. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo json single value unknown increment in bounded request decoding and validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Decode exactly one JSON value, reject trailing content and unknown fields when the contract is closed, and distinguish syntax, type, and size failures.
Use MaxBytesReader and server limits to bound actual body reads independently of absent, false, compressed, or chunked Content-Length.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
